name: session_start
description: Session startup workflow. Read state → diff DB → flag questions → report ready.

nodes.instruction: Read `{PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/project_state.md`. Confirm project type from first line (`<!-- type: knowledge|project_management -->`). Set `{PROJECT_ID}` for this session. Complete with `{"state_path":"projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/project_state.md"}` and summarize to user: 當前階段, 活躍任務 count, 未解問題 count, 資料庫現況.

nodes.description: Generate fresh project-scoped active_rules_summary, then Read it so the active D-NNN ruleset is in context for this session. Cost: ~3K tokens; benefit: prevents Tier-3 rewrites from drifting away from active decisions.
nodes.instruction:
(1) Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py generate-summary --project {PROJECT_ID} --output projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.active_rules_summary.md  (2) Read projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.active_rules_summary.md  (3) Count active decisions in the file (D-NNN occurrences) and report to user as 'N active decisions loaded'. Complete with {"summary_path":"projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.active_rules_summary.md","active_decision_count":N}.
IMPORTANT: After generate-summary completes, you MUST use the Read tool to read the generated .active_rules_summary.md file before calling complete. Include the first D-NNN decision ID found in the file as 'first_active_decision' in your complete outputs.

required_outputs.description: number of active D-NNN entries loaded

nodes.description: If project has backlog.db (project_management type), run backlog.py summary and remind to show open P0/P1, blocked, and stale items. Skipped for knowledge-type projects.
nodes.instruction: Only if project type is 'project_management': run bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/backlog.py --project {PROJECT_ID} summary, then bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/backlog.py --project {PROJECT_ID} remind. Report open P0/P1, blocked, stale items. Skip entirely for 'knowledge' type projects.

nodes.description: Run kb_index.py validate to detect expired TTL, supersede inconsistencies, and semantic conflicts. Report any WARN/ERROR to user.
nodes.instruction: Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py validate --warn-exit-zero. Report any ERROR or WARN entries to user. Do not block session on WARN-only results. ERROR entries require user acknowledgment.

nodes.description: Check DB for changes since last session (new tables, row counts)
nodes.instruction: If {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/*.db exists: run bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py show <db_path> --compact. Compare row counts with project_state.md 資料庫現況 block. Note any new tables or row count changes >10%.

nodes.description: Identify and flag open questions from project_state.md
nodes.instruction: Read '## 未解問題' section from project_state.md. If project_management type, also run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/backlog.py --project {PROJECT_ID} list --status blocked. Count unresolved items and summarize them explicitly. Complete with {"open_question_count":N,"open_questions_summary":"..."}. If none, use count 0 and summary '(none)'.

required_outputs.description: summary of open questions or explicit none marker

nodes.description: Generate a project-scoped session context bundle that combines active decisions, recent learnings, and open questions for this session.
nodes.instruction: (1) Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py generate-session-context --project {PROJECT_ID} --output projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.session_context_bundle.md (2) Read the generated bundle (3) Report its counts to user. Complete with {"bundle_path":"projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.session_context_bundle.md","bundle_decision_count":N,"bundle_learning_count":M,"bundle_open_question_count":Q}.

required_outputs.description: path to generated session context bundle
number of active decisions in bundle
number of recent learnings in bundle
number of open questions in bundle

nodes.description: Report session ready status to user with context summary
nodes.instruction: Report in 3-5 bullet points: project type + {PROJECT_ID}, 當前階段, active decision count, open question count, KB health status, DB status. If open questions exist, explicitly surface them as risk. End with: 就緒，等待指示。 Complete with {"ready_summary":"...","risk_status":"clear|open_questions|mixed","context_bundle_path":"projects/{PROJECT_ID}/workspace/.session_context_bundle.md","reported_open_question_count":Q}.

required_outputs.description: bundle path echoed in ready report
open question count surfaced in ready report
